def negative_circular_import_hidden_by_function_local_import_on_hot_path():
    rule_id = "circular_import_hidden_by_function_local_import_on_hot_path"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag circular import workarounds that push imports into frequent code paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
